session.user:

1. `uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/ packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/remote_github/ tests/commands/pr/test_remote_paths.py` 2. `uv run ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/ packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/remote_github/ tests/commands/pr/test_remote_paths.py` 3. `uv run pytest tests/ -x --tb=short -q` (run all unit tests, stop on first failure)
Report exact output for each command, especially any failures.

session.assistant:
## Report
### 1. Ruff Check (Linting) **Status:** PASSED ``` All checks passed! ```
### 2. Ruff Format Check **Status:** FAILED ``` Would reformat: tests/commands/pr/test_remote_paths.py 1 file would be reformatted, 28 files already formatted ```
File needs formatting: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/pr/test_remote_paths.py`
### 3. Pytest (Unit Tests) **Status:** FAILED - 1 test failure
**Failed Test:** - File: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/cli/commands/split/test_plan.py` - Test: `test_execute_split_plan_creates_worktrees` - Line: 286 - Error Type: `AttributeError` - Message: `'FakeGit' object has no attribute 'worktree'`
**Stack Trace:** ``` tests/cli/commands/split/test_plan.py:286: in test_execute_split_plan_creates_worktrees results = execute_split_plan(plan, git_ops) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/erk/cli/commands/stack/split_old/plan.py:207: in execute_split_plan git_ops.worktree.add_worktree( ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ```
The test is attempting to call `git_ops.worktree.add_worktree()` but the `FakeGit` object does not have a `worktree` attribute defined.
